exploration_notes: Implemented NoScheduleNoTraffic taint effect across 12 files. Changes: (1) Added TaintEffectNoScheduleNoTraffic constant in both internal types.go and API v1/types.go. (2) Updated 3 validation functions (core validation, pkg/util/taints, kubectl taint utils) to accept the new effect. (3) Updated scheduler's DoNotScheduleTaintsFilterFunc and preCheckForNode to block scheduling on NoScheduleNoTraffic-tainted nodes.
